prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm amber lamplight glows on the left from a single small flame, while a soft vertical seam of pale gold light divides the canvas and cool daylight falls on the white-robed figure at right; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The canvas is a diptych split by a vertical seam of pale gold light. On the left, an aged man with a grey beard in a deep blue robe is seated at a plain wooden table, a parchment at rest in his hands, his face lifted; a small clay oil lamp glows at the table's edge. On the right, a serene figure in a flowing white robe stands among a gathered group — a woman and a small child are positioned low before him, with several robed onlookers behind; two dim faint figures are barely visible in the upper-right shadow. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the divided canvas, the aged man at his lamp-lit table on the left and the white-robed figure among the gathered on the right, joined by the seam of gold light.

Cut to mid framing — the aged man seated in his blue robe at the wooden table, parchment at rest in his hands.

Cut to close-up — the aged man's weathered, upturned face and grey beard in amber lamplight.

Cut to insert — the parchment and the small clay oil lamp at the table's edge, its flame as painted light.

Cut to mid framing — the white-robed figure standing among the gathered group on the right.

Cut to close-up — the calm face of the white-robed figure, framed by long hair and beard.

Cut to lower framing — the woman and the small child positioned low before him, the child's hands clasped.

Return to full composition — the two halves joined by the vertical seam of gold light.

End hold on the white-robed figure among His own.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Quiet awe across a thousand years — longing answered.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
